title: LeadPlatform Website
description: Designed a marketing website for a gamification lead generating concept increasing conversion rate.
problem: LeadPlatform — a gamification-based lead generation concept — needed a marketing website that could explain an unfamiliar idea clearly and turn visitors into leads.
challenge: A marketing website was needed for a gamification lead generating concept to increase conversion rates and effectively communicate the value proposition.
solution: Designed a marketing website that effectively communicated the gamification concept and increased conversion rates through clear messaging and engaging visuals.

process.body: Distilled the gamification lead-generation idea into clear messaging so first-time visitors could quickly grasp the value proposition.
Designed engaging visuals and a layout aimed at moving visitors toward becoming leads.
Took the marketing site from UX and UI design through to frontend implementation.
